zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim於1370年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 安特里姆安特里姆時，她的父親Lord John Bisset45歲，母親Sawe O'Niel41歲。她於1399年與John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg在愛爾蘭庫迪 安特里姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1427年在愛爾蘭庫迪 安特里姆享年57歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 安特里姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim于1370年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 安特里姆安特里姆时，她的父亲Lord John Bisset45岁，母亲Sawe O'Niel41岁。她于1399年与John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg在爱尔兰庫迪 安特里姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1427年在爱尔兰庫迪 安特里姆享年57岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 安特里姆。

nameMeanings.name: Bisset,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of   Bissett  .
French: from a diminutive of Old French bisse ‘fine linen’ (see Bisson ).

variants.name: Bissett
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French biset ‘dark’, a diminutive of bis (see Biss ).

Altered form of French Bizet: nickname for someone with a dark complexion, derived from bis ‘grayish-brown’. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Bissette .

History: The surname Bissett (see 1 above) was brought to Scotland from Nottinghamshire c. 1175 by Henricus Byset, an Englishman who became a retainer of King William the Lion. — It was Jean George Bizet from Haute-Saône, France, whose surname was changed to Bissett (see 2 above) after his immigration to NS, Canada, in 1752.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim was born in 1370, in Antrim, County Antrim, Ireland, her father, Lord John Bisset, was 45 and her mother, Sawe O'Niel, was 41. She married John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg in 1399, in County Antrim, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1427, in County Antrim, Ireland, at the age of 57, and was buried in County Antrim, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim est née en 1370, à Antrim, County Antrim, Irlande, son père, Lord John Bisset, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Sawe O'Niel, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg en 1399, à County Antrim, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1427, à County Antrim, Irlande, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à County Antrim, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim 1370 in Antrim, County Antrim, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord John Bisset 45 und ihre Mutter Sawe O'Niel 41. Sie hat 1399 in County Antrim, Irland John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1427 im Alter von 57 Jahren in County Antrim, Irland und wurde in County Antrim, Irland begraben.

Lei sposato John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg nel 1399, nel County Antrim, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrimが1370年にアイルランドコウントイ アントリムアントリムで生まれた時，父Lord John Bissetは45歳，母Sawe O'Nielは41歳であった。1399年にアイルランドコウントイ アントリムでJohn Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyvegと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1427年にアイルランドコウントイ アントリムで57歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ アントリムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim(이)가 1370년 아일랜드 카운티 앤트림 앤트림에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord John Bisset(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sawe O'Niel(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1399년 아일랜드 카운티 앤트림에서 John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1427년 아일랜드 카운티 앤트림에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 앤트림에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim родилась в 1370 г. в местности антрим, коунти антрим, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Lord John Bisset было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Sawe O'Niel, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg в 1399 г. в местности коунти антрим, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1427 г. в местности коунти антрим, Ирландия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности коунти антрим, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim nació en 1370, en Antrim, County Antrim, Irlanda, su papá, Lord John Bisset, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Sawe O'Niel, tenía 41 años. Se casó con John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg en 1399, en County Antrim, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1427, en County Antrim, Irlanda, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en County Antrim, Irlanda.
